# AuthorizationStatus.authorized

**Case**

A person authorized the app to use FinanceKit services.

## Declaration

```swift
case authorized
```

## Enumeration Cases

- **AuthorizationStatus.denied**: A person denied the use of FinanceKit services for the app.
- **AuthorizationStatus.notDetermined**: A person has not chosen whether the app can use FinanceKit services.
